Veterans Benefits: South Dakota has no state individual income tax, provides veterans service officers and employment preference, and exempts $200,000 of owner-occupied value for qualifying permanently and totally disabled veterans; qualifying surviving spouses may receive a $150,000 exemption.
LGBTQSource: MAP South Dakota LGBTQ policy tally; Rapid City was not listed among HRC 2025 South Dakota MEI cities
Description: Black Hills regional center with a local VA outpatient clinic, Rapid City Medical Center and access to outdoor recreation in the Black Hills and Badlands. The city offers extensive hiking, biking and public golf, while Ellsworth Air Force Base supports a major nearby military presence. Tradeoffs include cold, snowy and variable winters, high 2024 violent-crime rate, and conservative county-level presidential results despite a Democratic shift since 2016.
